entities.name: External Agent Routing Rule
observations: When needing Qwen / WorkBuddy / OpenCode / Z.ai, consolidate all context, current task state, test prompts, and the specific request into a single file.
Ask the user to route; do not specify which agent to call. The user will auto-route to the appropriate agent.
This workflow is critical for multi-agent tasks.

entities.name: Skills Optimization Task
observations: Scope: 18 skills under /data/user/skills/*/SKILL.md.
Git initialized in /data/user/skills on branch auto-optimize/20260620-0015.
Test prompts generated in /workspace/test-prompts/*.json (2-3 per skill).
Results TSV at /workspace/auto-optimize-results.tsv.
Paused before Phase 1 baseline evaluation (structure + effect dimensions).
Next step when resumed: confirm test prompts, run baseline evaluation, hill-climb optimize from lowest score.

entities.name: OrdPaw Main Task
observations: Current main development task as of 2026-06-20.
Add OrdPaw support for downloading AI conversations, AI-generated programs, files, Skills, MCP, Scripts, and OrdPaw source code.
Support batch and multi-select downloads.
Support configurable storage location and space limits.
Support distributed storage: Browser and Server.
Fix New UI/UX animation performance issues and refine visual design to be elegant and high-quality.
Status: awaiting OrdPaw repository URL to clone into /workspace/ordpaw.

entities.name: memory-booster Setup
observations: Enabled as long-term cross-session memory system on 2026-06-20.
Memory directory: /workspace/.workbuddy/memory.
ChromaDB directory: /workspace/memory-booster/chroma_db.
Must run scripts with PYENV_VERSION=3.13.13 because Python 3.14 is incompatible with tokenizers/PyO3.
Patched /data/user/skills/memory-booster/scripts/index_memory.py line 106: get_memory_files() -> get_memory_files(MEMORY_DIRS).
MEMORY.md and 2026-06-20.md diary created and indexed.
MCP memory graph (mcp_memory) is now configured as the cross-session memory backend on 2026-06-20.
Entities created: External Agent Routing Rule, Skills Optimization Task, OrdPaw Main Task, memory-booster Setup.
Relations created linking workflow and memory state to active projects.
